text: Moving from the sterile calm of an empty hallway to the vibrant energy of an exhibition space, I journey from silence to stimulation. The first space feels cold and slightly unsettling, its emptiness echoing with possibility or abandonment. The second, filled with color and intellectual promise, awakens my curiosity. Here, surrounded by evidence of human creativity and inquiry, I feel alert, engaged, and contemplative—reminded of the endless dance between potential and realization in all our endeavors.
